message:
style+feat: apply rustfmt formatting fixes and add created_at to dependency query

- Apply rustfmt line-wrapping in agents.rs (dry-run preview message) and
  sync.rs (orphan-removed output line) to satisfy fmt --check
- Flatten chained method calls in sqlite.rs epic progress query for
  idiomatic one-liner style
- Extend dependency metadata query to include created_at column, enabling
  downstream consumers (e.g. `br show`) to display when dependencies were
  originally created alongside their current status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
